scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/.next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/server/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.dev:backend: docker compose build --no-cache server && docker compose up -d postgres redis server
scripts.dev:backend:down: docker compose stop server redis postgres
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.test:contracts: corepack pnpm --filter @kaidon/apl test && corepack pnpm --filter @kaidon/runtime-protocol test && corepack pnpm --filter @kaidon/component-registry test
